item21_financial_structure.parent_relationship: Wholly owned subsidiary of Hilton Domestic Operating Company Inc.
item21_financial_structure.tax_treatment: Disregarded entity for US income tax purposes; taxable income included in Hilton Worldwide consolidated return
item21_financial_structure.cash_management: Hilton centralized cash management system; entity has no independent cash management

distributions_pattern.note: Distributions consistently exceed or approach net income; retained earnings declining

key_notes.note1_organization: DE LLC, formed Sep 2007, began Oct 2007. Wholly owned by Hilton Domestic Operating Company Inc.
key_notes.note2_revenue_recognition: IP license recognized over time as series of distinct services. Royalty fees recognized as services provided. Sales/COO fees recognized over contract term. Termination fees recognized when received.
key_notes.note3_acquisition: Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired May 2024 for ~$85M as asset acquisition. 15-year useful life.
key_notes.note4_franchise_contracts: Net carrying value $392.7M (2024). Contract acquisition costs $306.2M; Graduate intangibles $82.0M; costs to obtain $4.5M. Amortized straight-line over 10-20 year terms.
key_notes.note5_fair_value: Fair values of financial assets/liabilities estimated equal to carrying values.
key_notes.note6_income_taxes: Disregarded entity; no US income tax provision. Foreign tax expense $412K (2024) — US territory franchise licensing taxes.
key_notes.note7_commitments: Unconditional and irrevocable guarantee of certain Hilton parent debt (maturing 2025-2033). All assets pledged as collateral.
key_notes.note8_related_party: Settlements with Hilton affiliates: $1.5B (2024). Operator agreement with affiliate — no compensation paid. Short-term note payable for Graduate acquisition settled Feb 2024.
key_notes.note9_subsequent_events: Evaluated through March 18, 2025 (note text says 2024 — apparent typo). No material subsequent events.

liquidated_damages.post_opening_first_2yr: Greater of Hotel's or System's Average Monthly Royalty × 60
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Average Monthly Royalty × remaining months
